answer:
The official Mermaid.js library is open-source and free to use without an API or subscription [1]. However, several third-party platforms provide Mermaid-based services with varying pricing models:

Beauty Diagram offers a developer API with a free tier that allows for watermarked exports and rate-limited rendering [2]. You can access it by skipping the Authorization header or using a personal access token for higher quotas [2].

```http
GET /v1/render?mermaid=... HTTP/1.1
Host: api.beauty-diagram.com
Authorization: Bearer bd_live_...
```

Other tools like Mermaid Chart and Mermaid Editor offer tiered SaaS plans with AI features and cloud sync [3][4], while Mermaid Studio provides paid plugins for JetBrains IDEs [5][6].

results.title: Is Mermaid Free? A Plain-English Answer to Mermaid Pricing in 2026
API: Beautify Mermaid, Export SVG/PNG, Share | Beauty Diagram
Pricing — Free & Pro Plans | Mermaid Editor
